author: Jay Zuccarelli
name: 11L + LN Scale + BigramHash 3072x112 + GPTQ + EMA
description: 11-layer transformer with LN Scale 1/sqrt(layer+1), BigramHash 3072x112, full Hessian GPTQ with AR self-generated calibration, EMA decay=0.997, XSA all layers, LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, Muon momentum=0.99, warmdown=3000 steps, 7333 steps in 10 min on 8xH100.
